version_description: This version of Little Jeannie is best played with barre chords but open chords sound good too. No capo is required.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

recommended.version_description: Corrected vocal melody and percussion hits that had been distorted in transfer.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fsus4[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You got so much love, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
And you take it where it strikes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
And give it to the likes of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You got so much love, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]
So I see you when I can[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
You make me all a man can be[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others who would treat you cruel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Fsus4[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
And oh, Jeannie, you were always someone's fool[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You got so much time, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]
Though you've grown beyond your years[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
You still retain the fears of youth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You got so much time, little Jeannie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]
But you're burnin' it up so fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Searchin' for some lasting truth[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others who would treat you cruel[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Fsus4[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
But oh, Jeannie, I will always be your fool[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I want you to be my acrobat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I want you to be my lover[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, there were others, and I've known quite a few[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Fsus4[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
But oh, Jeannie, I'm still in love with you[/tab]


[Coda]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Makin' the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Fsus4[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, Jeannie, (Oh, Jeannie) I'm so in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
You stepped into my life from a bad dream[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Makin' the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]

[tab]                           [ch]Gm[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Makin' the life that I had seem suddenly shiny and new[/tab]

Oh, Jeannie, (Oh, Jeannie) I'm so in love, I'm so in love[/tab]
